summary: Asset Management V2 - Full CRUD for Locations, Slots, Bundles, Assets with relationship management and history tracking. Backend: 34/34 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified.

design_issues.issue: Minor console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent

seed_data_creation: Pre-existing test data: Location BERE01, Bundle BDL-DE-001, Slot BERE01-01, Assets TAB-DE-001 and SCN-DE-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset Management V2 API fully functional. All CRUD operations for Locations, Slots, Bundles, Assets working. Relationship management (install/uninstall bundle to slot, assign/remove asset from bundle) working with history tracking. Frontend has Rollout Management sub-tab under Assets with 4 internal tabs.

details: Returns counts for locations, slots, bundles, assets
Includes breakdown by status (active/planned, installed/empty, deployed/in_storage)
Includes assets by type aggregation
POST /api/asset-mgmt/locations - Create location
GET /api/asset-mgmt/locations - List with filters (country, status, search)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/locations/{location_id} - Get single location with slots
PUT /api/asset-mgmt/locations/{location_id} - Update location
DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/locations/{location_id} - Delete (only if no slots)
POST /api/asset-mgmt/slots - Create slot (requires valid location_id)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/slots - List with filters (location_id, status, country)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/slots/{slot_id} - Get slot with bundle details
PUT /api/asset-mgmt/slots/{slot_id} - Update slot
DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/slots/{slot_id} - Delete (only if empty)
POST /api/asset-mgmt/bundles - Create bundle
GET /api/asset-mgmt/bundles - List with filters (country, status, search)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/bundles/{bundle_id} - Get bundle with assets and slot info
PUT /api/asset-mgmt/bundles/{bundle_id} - Update bundle
DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/bundles/{bundle_id} - Delete (only if not installed and no assets)

5_assets_crud.description: CRUD for Assets collection with history tracking
details: POST /api/asset-mgmt/assets - Create asset (auto-adds 'created' history event)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/assets - List with filters (type, status, bundle_id, country, search)
GET /api/asset-mgmt/assets/{asset_id} - Get asset with full history and relations
PUT /api/asset-mgmt/assets/{asset_id} - Update asset
DELETE /api/asset-mgmt/assets/{asset_id} - Delete asset
Install bundle to slot - updates slot status to 'installed', bundle status to 'deployed'
Adds 'installed' history event to all assets in bundle
Uninstall bundle from slot - updates slot status to 'empty', bundle status to 'in_storage'
Adds 'uninstalled' history event to all assets
Assign asset to bundle - updates asset's bundle_id
Adds 'assigned_to_bundle' history event
Remove asset from bundle - clears bundle_id
Adds 'removed_from_bundle' history event

8_frontend_rollout_management_tab.description: Frontend: Rollout Management tab in Assets section
details: Rollout Management is default sub-tab under Assets
3 sub-tabs: Rollout Management, Hardware Assets, Software Assets
Statistics cards showing correct counts
4 internal tabs: Locations, Slots, Bundles, Assets
Locations table with ID, Land, Kunde, Stadt, Slots, Status columns
Slots table with ID, Location, Bundle, TeamViewer, Status, Installed columns
Bundles table with ID, Land, Assets, Installed in, Status columns
Detail modals show relationships (slots in location, assets in bundle)
Delete button available in detail modals
